results.rendered_html: śaṃstṛ m. one who recites, a reciter,  RV. ;  AitBr.  (a priest identified with the Praśāstṛ and mentioned along with five others in  RV. i, 162, 5 ; his sacrificial duties correspond with those of the Maitrā-varuṇa of the later ritual)
